code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut evens_str = ""
mut odds_str = ""
mut evens_empty = true
mut odds_empty = true

mut i = 0
while i < n
  mut skipping = true
  while skipping
    if i >= n
      skipping = false
    else
      let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        i = i + 1
      else
        skipping = false
      end
    end
  end

  if i < n
    let start = i
    mut scanning = true
    while scanning
      if i >= n
        scanning = false
      else
        let b = match string.byte_at(input, i)
        when Some(x)
          x
        when None
          0
        end
        if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
          scanning = false
        else
          i = i + 1
        end
      end
    end
    let token = string.substring(input, start, i)
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(num)
      if num % 2 == 0
        if evens_empty
          evens_str = "#{num}"
          evens_empty = false
        else
          evens_str = "#{evens_str} #{num}"
        end
      else
        if odds_empty
          odds_str = "#{num}"
          odds_empty = false
        else
          odds_str = "#{odds_str} #{num}"
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
end

println("evens=#{evens_str}")
println("odds=#{odds_str}")
